summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.providers; import org.eclipse.jface.viewers.Viewer; import org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.PatternFilter; import org.eclipse.ui.views.IViewCategory; import org.eclipse.ui.views.IViewDescriptor; public class ViewPatternFilter extends PatternFilter { public ViewPatternFilter() { super(); } @Override public boolean isElementSelectable(Object element) { return element instanceof IViewDescriptor; }
